flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Clarke University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.9k → $40.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Clarke University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.9k → $40.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Clarke University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (54.9% vs 60.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Clarke University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
